title: Argo CD Out-of-Sync Due to Server-Side Apply Field Manager Conflicts
app: Argo CD + Kubernetes 1.18+ SSA; controller logs to Splunk
spl:
index=devops sourcetype="argocd:application"
| search "field manager" OR "ssa" OR "server-side apply" OR "conflict"
| stats count by name, namespace, revision
| sort -count
description: Field manager conflicts prevent sync and mask true desired state.
value: Surfaces SSA drift that simple `kubectl diff` may miss in multi-controller clusters.
implementation: Enable verbose sync errors; join with Kypso/Helm operator audit if present.
visualization: Table (apps with conflicts), Bar chart (count by namespace).

references.title: Splunk Infrastructure Monitoring App for Argo CD (GitHub)

knownFalsePositives: Drift from manual console fixes during incidents, automated tool changes, or planned config updates outside IaC.
grandmaExplanation: We watch GitOps sync and Argo signals so clusters stay aligned with the desired configuration in Git.
